title: astragalus andrasovszkyi
intro: Astragalus andrasovszkyi, also known as Andrasovsky's milkvetch, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is a perennial herb native to Central Asia, and its medicinal properties lie in its root, which has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to enhance immune function and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Astragalus andrasovszkyi include its potential to prevent illnesses such as the common cold and flu, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the root of Astragalus andrasovszkyi is often dried and used as a tea, or it may be combined with other herbs and made into capsules or tablets.
